sub_modules.fir_tap_shift_next: Combinational next-state generator for the FIR sample delay line; inserts the newest sample and shifts older taps.
sub_modules.fir_sym_preadd: Combinational symmetric-tap pre-adder for the 101-tap linear-phase FIR, producing 50 mirrored sample sums plus the center sample.
sub_modules.fir_coeff_rom_101: Combinational hard-coded ROM containing the exact required 101-tap coefficient set, exposed as 50 symmetric pair coefficients plus the center coefficient.
sub_modules.fir_product_bank: Combinational multiplier bank for all symmetric pre-add sums and the center tap.
sub_modules.fir_accumulator_tree: Combinational wide signed accumulator that sums all tap products into a 64-bit MAC result.
sub_modules.fir_output_scale: Combinational fixed-point output scaler using arithmetic right shift by 15 and truncation to DATA_W+GAIN_W bits.
